sell.proof_text_1: Half of our properties find a buyer
sell.proof_text_2: And when a broader exposure is needed, our network generates over
sell.constat_title: What costs sellers the most money
sell.constat_subtitle: Most agencies publish your property on every portal from day one. It's the standard method.
sell.constat_subtitle_highlight: It's also the one that costs you the most.
sell.diff_subtitle: Three concrete commitments that change the outcome of your sale.
sell.deliverables_subtitle: Each step produces a tangible document or tool.
sell.faq_subtitle: Straight answers to the questions every seller asks before getting started.
sell.faq_subtitle_mobile: Straight answers to the questions every seller asks.
sell.team_description: GARY is a boutique agency based in Geneva. Every broker knows their market inside out and handles a limited number of mandates at a time. Your property isn't just another file — it's a mission.
sell.team_quote: “In our profession, trust isn't decreed. It's proven, property by property, step by step.”
sell.cta_final_subtitle: A broker from your area will call you back within 24h — no commitment, no pressure.
sell.cta_final_form_text: Leave us your number, a broker who knows your neighbourhood will contact you for a confidential first discussion.
sell.hero_subtitle_line1: We don't publish your property everywhere hoping for a buyer.
sell.hero_subtitle_line2: We control who sees it, when, and at what price.
sell.constat_card_1_desc:
Your property is seen by everyone in 48h.
Past this peak, it is **perceived as unsold**.
Buyers negotiate down.
sell.constat_card_2_desc:
Without analysis of recent comparables,
the price is often too high, then **publicly reduced**,
which weakens your position.
sell.constat_card_3_desc:
Publishing everywhere at the same time
is not a strategy. Result:
**unqualified viewings** and a stagnating property.
sell.diff_point_1_desc: Not a number from an algorithm. An **analysis of recent sales** in your neighbourhood, a well-argued pricing strategy, and a **complete report** you can share with your notary or financial advisor.
sell.diff_point_2_desc: Your property is first presented to a **select circle** of qualified buyers, then gradually expanded to portals. Every step is validated with you. This sequence is what **protects your price**.
sell.diff_point_3_desc: We don't publish to attract the masses. We activate our **network of qualified buyers** looking for exactly your type of property. **Discretion guaranteed**.
sell.journey_step_1_desc: We visit your property and listen to your situation: timelines, expectations, constraints. No sales pitch, no commitment. Just an honest conversation to understand what you really need.
sell.journey_step_2_desc: Analysis of recent sales in your neighbourhood, evaluation of strengths and areas for improvement. You receive a complete report with a well-argued price range.
sell.journey_step_3_desc: Together, we define who sees your property first, at what price, and in what order. This sequence is what protects your price.
sell.journey_step_4_desc: Professional photography, dedicated microsite, presentation brochure. Your property is first offered exclusively, then gradually expanded. Every step is validated with you.
sell.journey_step_5_desc: Offer negotiation, notary coordination, support through to handing over the keys. We remain your single point of contact from the first call to the final deed.
sell.deliverable_1_desc: Recent comparables, price positioning, neighbourhood analysis. A document you can share with your notary.
sell.deliverable_2_desc: An elegant web page dedicated to your property. HD photos, floor plan, location — shareable with a single link.
sell.deliverable_3_desc: Professional photoshoot. Every image highlights the spaces, the light, the views.
sell.deliverable_4_desc: High-quality printed and digital document for qualified buyers.
sell.deliverable_5_desc: Social media, professional lifestyle video, targeted buzz. Your property is showcased to reach the right buyers, at the right time.
sell.deliverable_6_desc: From the promise to the authentic deed, we coordinate every step with your notary.
sell.testimonial_1_text: GARY sold our apartment in 3 weeks, above the estimated price. Impeccable support from start to finish.
sell.testimonial_2_text: Professionalism and discretion. Our villa was presented only to qualified buyers. Result: a quick sale with no negotiation.
sell.testimonial_3_text: The valuation report was of remarkable quality. We were able to make our decision with complete confidence.
sell.faq_q_1: How much does a valuation cost?
sell.faq_a_1: The valuation is free and without commitment. We provide you with a complete report including comparable analysis, price positioning, and recommendations. You then freely decide whether you wish to continue with us.
sell.faq_q_2: How long does it take to sell a property?
sell.faq_a_2: On average, our mandates sell in 8 weeks. But every situation is different. Half of our properties find a buyer before even being published on portals, thanks to our network of qualified buyers.
sell.faq_a_3: We charge a commission aligned with the Swiss prestige market. The exact rate is discussed during our first meeting and depends on the type of mandate and chosen strategy. No hidden fees, no surprises.
sell.faq_q_4: Should I do renovations before selling?
sell.faq_a_4: Not necessarily. During our visit, we identify high-impact improvements (and those not worth the investment). Sometimes light home staging is enough. We advise you honestly on what makes a real difference.
sell.faq_q_5: What's the difference from a large agency?
sell.faq_a_5: In a large agency, your property is one file among hundreds. At GARY, each broker handles a limited number of mandates at a time. You have a single, reachable point of contact who knows your property as if it were their own.
sell.faq_q_6: Can I sell without publishing on portals?
sell.faq_a_6: Absolutely. Some of our properties sell exclusively through our network of qualified buyers, without ever appearing online. This is called an off-market sale. If discretion is important to you, it's an option we master perfectly.

about.hero_vr_desc: Over 60 years of combined experience in the French-speaking Swiss real estate market
about.identity_text_1: is a real estate agency specialising in the sale of apartments, houses and new developments in French-speaking Switzerland.
about.identity_text_2_prefix: True strategists of real estate sales, our team combines an in-depth knowledge of the local property market, forged over more than
about.identity_text_2_suffix: , with next-generation marketing expertise that is innovative and high-performing.
about.distinguish_1_main: Each broker has over 10 years of experience in the local real estate market
about.distinguish_2_main: A modern and high-performing marketing approach
about.distinguish_2_detail: Bespoke staging, professional photos and videos, strategic distribution
about.distinguish_3_main: An active and loyal community of over 40k followers
about.distinguish_conclusion_prefix: All combined to offer you a
about.influencers_subtitle: Your property reaches an audience that portals cannot. We create desire even before the listing goes live.
about.insta_stat_rank: Top Swiss real estate agency on social media
about.sponsor_1_short: divorce.ch simplifies divorce procedures in Switzerland. Our activities complement each other in supporting clients during periods of transition.
about.sponsor_1_long:
divorce.ch is a Swiss platform specialising in simplifying divorce-related procedures through accessible digital tools and structured support for the administrative and legal aspects of separation.

Although we do not collaborate directly, our activities sometimes address a clientele facing the same life stages. During a separation, questions related to housing and real estate assets frequently become central. In this context, our approaches complement each other naturally: Gary supports clients in selling their property, while divorce.ch facilitates and clarifies the administrative steps of the divorce process.
about.sponsor_2_short: Mise en Voix is a cultural association based in Cologny that celebrates the art of voice and the world of opera through various artistic projects and events.
about.sponsor_2_long: Mise en Voix is a cultural association based in Cologny that celebrates the art of voice and the world of opera through various artistic projects and events. By bringing together artists, enthusiasts and partners, the association helps keep the cultural scene of the Geneva region alive.
about.sponsor_3_short: Planifique supports individuals and entrepreneurs in financial planning and wealth management. A partnership built on a shared vision of long-term investment.
about.sponsor_3_long:
Planifique is a company specialising in financial planning and wealth structuring. It supports individuals and entrepreneurs in managing their finances, pensions and implementing sustainable investment strategies.

As real estate often plays a central role in a wealth strategy, this partnership follows a complementary approach. While Gary supports clients in selling and enhancing the value of real estate, Planifique brings financial planning expertise to help clients structure and optimise their long-term wealth vision.
about.sponsor_4_short: Plus Groupe supports clients in finding the most suitable financing when purchasing property. A key partner in structuring a real estate project.
about.sponsor_4_long:
Plus Groupe supports individuals in finding the best financing solutions when acquiring property. Thanks to their network and expertise, they analyse the various market offers to guide clients towards the bank and financing conditions best suited to their situation.

In a real estate project, financing is an essential step. Our partnership is therefore based on a complementary approach: Gary supports clients in searching, selling and enhancing the value of properties, while Plus Groupe guides them in choosing the most advantageous banking solution and financing to complete their purchase.
about.sponsor_5_short: The CCIG supports economic and entrepreneurial development in Geneva. A network that brings together and supports businesses in the region.
about.sponsor_5_long:
The Geneva Chamber of Commerce, Industry and Services (CCIG) plays a central role in the economic dynamism of the canton. It brings together a wide network of companies and entrepreneurs and promotes exchanges, collaboration opportunities and local economic development.

As an active company in the region, Gary is part of this entrepreneurial ecosystem. This affiliation allows us to be part of a solid network of Geneva economic players and contribute to the development and influence of the local economic fabric.
about.sponsor_6_short: TC Veyrier Grand-Donzel is an active tennis club in the Geneva region. We are proud to support the club through our sponsorship and promote the values of sport.
about.sponsor_6_long:
TC Veyrier Grand-Donzel is a tennis club located in the Geneva region that brings together enthusiasts and athletes of all ages around the practice of tennis. The club actively contributes to local sporting life and the development of sport in the region.

Through our sponsorship, Gary is proud to support this sporting initiative. We attach great importance to the values that sport conveys, such as discipline, respect and self-improvement, principles that also resonate in our professional approach.
about.sponsor_7_short: On the Water is a unique musical event held on Lake Geneva. We are proud to support this local initiative through our sponsorship.
about.sponsor_7_long:
On the Water is a unique Geneva event held on Lake Geneva, where a floating stage hosts DJs on a catamaran in the heart of Geneva's harbour. The audience enjoys the music directly from the water, aboard boats or watercraft, for an original summer experience close to the lake.

GARY supports this event through its sponsorship, notably with our logo featured on life jackets used during the event. Beyond visibility, this support also helps promote water safety, an essential element during this type of nautical gathering. Through this partnership, we are happy to contribute to a local initiative that celebrates life around Lake Geneva.

estimate.trust.quote_1: GARY sold our house in 3 weeks, above the estimated price. Their sequential release strategy made all the difference.
estimate.trust.quote_2: Professionalism, responsiveness and transparency. Our apartment found a buyer before it was even listed online.
estimate.trust.quote_3: GARY's support is impeccable. Every step was clear and well executed. I recommend without hesitation.
estimate.trust.quote_4: We were looking for an agency that could sell quickly and discreetly. GARY perfectly met our expectations.
